name: SWEAT Command Center Dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays a list of all SWEAT projects with status indicators (in-progress, completed)
Each project entry shows project name, current flow stage, and last updated timestamp
Clicking a project navigates to its dedicated detail page
Detail page top section displays a visual flow indicator showing all stages from Requirement Master to Code Smith
Current stage is highlighted in the flow indicator
Detail page middle section displays detailed information about the current active stage
Detail page right sidebar displays real-time statistics including: total tasks, completed tasks, in-progress tasks, open Linear issues, closed Linear issues
Detail page provides instant access to all generated artefacts: Requirements文档, Specification文档, Plans, Tasks, Linear issues
Artefacts are categorized and clickable with direct links or preview capability
Dashboard shows project progress percentage based on completed stages
Completed projects are visually distinguished from in-progress projects
All page loads complete within 2 seconds
Dashboard is responsive and usable on desktop (1920x1080 minimum)
Professional, command-center aesthetic with dark mode option
